fields.label: Uploads Base Path
fields.description: Filesystem path where uploaded images are stored

fields.label: Uploads Base URL
fields.description: Public URL prefix for serving uploaded images

fields.label: Max File Size (bytes)
fields.description: Maximum allowed upload file size in bytes

fields.label: Allowed MIME Types
fields.description: Comma-separated list of allowed image MIME types

fields.label: Default Language
fields.description: Default language code applied to new pages

fields.label: Default Robots Meta
fields.description: Default robots meta value applied to new pages

fields.label: Posts Per Page
fields.description: Default page size for public post listings

fields.label: Scheduled Publish Interval (seconds)
fields.description: How often the scheduled-publish tick runs

fields.label: Public Base URL
fields.description: Absolute site root for RSS feed channel + fallback item permalinks

fields.label: RSS Item Limit
fields.description: Maximum number of items in an RSS feed

fields.label: Switch on prerendered SEO generation
fields.description: When on, content changes write prerendered SEO HTML for crawlers. SPA only if switched off.

fields.label: Enabled Languages
fields.description: Languages offered in the post/page editor and the content-list language filter.
